layout.title: Features - OpenAppCLI
layout.description: Learn about OpenAppCLI's core features: MCP protocol integration, AI Agent native support, universal application support, and intelligent strategy selection.

hero.title: Core Features
hero.subtitle: Not Only Website, Not Only Data Collection
hero.description: OpenAppCLI provides complete application automation solutions, from data extraction to application control, from CLI tools to AI Agent interaction standards.

mcp.title: MCP Protocol Integration
mcp.subtitle: AI Agent Native Interaction Capabilities
mcp.description: Through Model Context Protocol (MCP) protocol, OpenAppCLI provides standardized application interaction interfaces for AI Agents.

features.title: Standardized Tool Interfaces
features.description: listTools, callTool and other standard MCP interfaces

features.title: Resource Access Interfaces
features.description: listResources, readResource and other resource management interfaces

features.title: Prompt System
features.description: listPrompts, getPrompt and other intelligent task interfaces

features.title: Two-way Data Flow
features.description: Real-time two-way communication between AI Agent and applications

aiAgent.title: AI Agent Native Support
aiAgent.subtitle: From CLI Tool to AI Agent Bridge
aiAgent.description: OpenAppCLI is not just a CLI tool, but the standard bridge for AI Agent and application interaction.

features.title: Native Integration
features.description: AI Agents can directly call OpenAppCLI functions and resources

features.title: Structured Interaction
features.description: Achieve reliable structured data exchange through standard protocols

features.title: Intelligent Adaptation
features.description: AI Agents can intelligently select the best application operation strategy

features.title: Error Handling
features.description: Complete error handling and recovery mechanisms

platforms.title: Universal Application Support
platforms.subtitle: Not Only Website - Full Application Type Coverage
platforms.description: From Web applications to desktop applications, from mobile applications to game applications, one platform supports all application types.

platforms.name: Web & Electron
platforms.description: 50+ site adapters, browser reuse, anti-detection mechanisms

intelligence.title: Intelligent Strategy Selection
intelligence.subtitle: AI-Driven Automation Strategies
intelligence.description: OpenAppCLI has built-in intelligent strategy selector that can automatically select the best operation strategy based on application type and environment.

features.title: Automatic Strategy Detection
features.description: Intelligently identify application types and best operation methods

features.title: Fallback Mechanism
features.description: Automatically switch to backup solutions when primary strategy fails

features.title: Performance Optimization
features.description: Optimize operation performance based on historical data

features.title: Error Recovery
features.description: Intelligent error detection and automatic recovery

comparison.title: Technical Comparison
comparison.subtitle: OpenAppCLI vs Traditional Solutions
comparison.description: Compared to traditional application automation solutions, OpenAppCLI provides more powerful and flexible solutions.

useCases.title: Application Scenarios
useCases.subtitle: Real-world Use Cases
useCases.description: OpenAppCLI can be applied to various real-world scenarios to solve practical problems.

cases.title: Social Media Automation
cases.description: AI Agents automatically manage social media accounts, post content, interact with fans

cases.title: Game Automation
